text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The annual beachside summer training camp is well underway, where
the students are training harder than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The sand provides such a different experience from running on turf. I
can truly feel the impact it's having on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All right, I should give it another—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you hear there's gonna be a festival held around here
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: There is? Let's go after training, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, a festival? That sounds rather charming.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have some fond memories of going to one when I was younger. It
was fun to see all the stalls and activities on offer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, would that be all right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'd best wrap up my training quickly. I'll put everything
into this last sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our training ends, McQueen and I head to the festival grounds
as a golden hue befalls the skies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's all so lively!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: There are so many stalls that I almost don't know where to start... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um, would it be okay to take a look at some of the stalls farther that
way?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Let's be off, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I intend to follow right behind her, but as I begin walking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowds prove tricky to navigate, and I bump into someone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time that I am able to get my bearings again, I have already
lost sight of McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after searching for a while, I am unable to locate her in the sea
of people.
choice_data_list: (Just how far could she have gone?)
(Just how far could she have gone?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, the announcement system comes online.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
A lost person has come to the staff tent. Mejiro McQueen is seeking
her trainer. Please come to the event staff tent upon hearing this
message.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are!
choice_data_list: I'm glad you're all right too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, it's all because I went on ahead without so much as looking
back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This time I'll be sure to stick by your side as we walk around...
choice_data_list: It wasn't a big deal, really.
It wasn't a big deal, really.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Even so, I don't want to cause you any more trouble...
choice_data_list:
There's one rule at a festival: let loose and have
fun!

There's one rule at a festival: let loose and have
fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's... a rule?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it would appear that everyone is following the edict well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I have a request. Can we head back towards the stalls I
had originally taken an interest in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'd like you to join me in the festivities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Just have to fish this little one out... Ha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh no, the string snapped... Shopkeep, I'd like to try again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has taken a keen interest in the balloon fishing
game.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A short time later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look over to see McQueen triumphantly holding a festival balloon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that ended up being more of an ordeal than I thought. I'm glad
I could scoop it up in the end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I could conquer any of the games here. Let's head to the
next stall!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look over there! A shooting game! It says they have premium
prizes as well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wonder what we can get... Shall we take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer, come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking in all of the excitement that the festival has to offer, we
decide to walk back to the training camp grounds together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for accompanying me tonight. It was very
enjoyable.
choice_data_list: I didn't do much but stand around, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That's not true! Well, how do I put this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If anyone else had come along, I certainly wouldn't have "let loose,"
as you mentioned.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a Mejiro, I've always strived to maintain a certain level of decorum
at all times. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: If I'm with you, I... I feel like I can afford to relax a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You don't mind that, do you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That makes me so happy to hear! I have another request, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Would you care to take a bit of a stroll with me? We can eat these
carrot sponge cakes I purchased along the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I would consider eating while walking to be poor manners,
but it's just you and me out here tonight...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you! All right then, please go ahead and help yourself.
